why_it_matters: UiO-66-NH2 burdens change markedly with the synthesis route, especially when moving away from DMF-intensive solvothermal processing
deployment_implication: Cradle-to-gate environmental burden and production cost can change dramatically with route selection
preferred_response: Report the exact synthesis route and solvent-recovery assumptions; prioritise aqueous, solvent-free, or mechanochemical routes where performance is retained

why_it_matters: Even when UiO-66-NH2 is used as a membrane component or MMM filler rather than as a bulk adsorbent, its production route still strongly affects environmental burden and cost.
deployment_implication: Membrane studies should not treat the MOF contribution as a fixed or negligible background input
preferred_response: Use route-specific inventory data for UiO-66-based membrane materials in LCA/TEA comparisons

why_it_matters: UiO-66 is usually studied as a powder, but real deployment requires pellets, monoliths, beads, or structured adsorbents
deployment_implication: Powder metrics alone are not enough for practical sustainability claims, because shaping affects properties and process-level performance
preferred_response: Include shaping/formulation effects and evaluate structured materials, not only pristine powders

why_it_matters: UiO-66 sustainability depends on working capacity and regeneration conditions under realistic gas compositions, not only on equilibrium uptake under ideal conditions
deployment_implication: Use-phase energy can dominate total impacts per tonne of CO2 captured if regeneration requires deep vacuum, high temperature, or yields low working capacity
preferred_response: Report working capacity, regeneration temperature or vacuum level, humidity and impurity conditions, and compare materials on a process-level functional basis

why_it_matters: The production burden of UiO-66-NH2 must be amortised over its useful operating life
deployment_implication: High replacement loss can erase the climate benefit of the adsorbent during CCS operation
preferred_response: Report replacement rate, durability, and cyclic stability under realistic conditions
